# ToolRate – Crowdsourced Reliability Layer for AI Agents

ToolRate helps autonomous AI agents evaluate the reliability of external tools and APIs *before* calling them, reducing failures, token waste, and improving production readiness.

## Available Full Translations

- English → /llms/overview-en.md
- Deutsch → /llms/overview-de.md
